rkm.project.golfgame

Class Triangle

  • java.lang.Object
    • rkm.project.golfgame.Triangle

  • public class Triangle
extends java.lang.Object
    Triangle class
    Author:
    RoxaneKang

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Triangle()
      Empty constructor
      Triangle(Point p1, Point p2, Point p3)
      Triangle constructor using 3 points
      Triangle(Point p1, Point p2, Point p3, java.awt.Color clr)
      Triangle construcor using 3 points as well as setting the colour

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      float area()
      Calculate area of the triangle
      Point[] points()
      Retrieve the array of points composing the triangle

      Print the x coordinates of the points composing the triangle

      Retrieve the array of segments composing the triangle
      int[] tabCoordsX()
      Retrieve an array of x coordinates of each the points composing the triangle
      int[] tabCoordsY()
      Retrieve an array of y coordinates of each the points composing the triangle

      • segments

        Retrieve the array of segments composing the triangle

        Retrieve the array of points composing the triangle

      • testTriangleContainsPoint

        public java.lang.Boolean testTriangleContainsPoint(Point<java.lang.Float> p)
        Checks if the triangle contains the given point
        Parameters:
        p - point to check whether belongs or not the the triangle
        Returns:
        true if triangle contains given point, false otherwise
